Package org.eventb.core.pog

Interface IPOGFilterModule

All Superinterfaces:
IFilterModule, IModule
All Known Implementing Classes:
MachineEventActionFISFilterModule, MachineTheoremFilterModule, POGFilterModule, POGFilterTestModule
public interface IPOGFilterModule extends IFilterModule
The filter modules of the proof obligation generator can stop certain proof obligations from being generated. The use of the methods initModule(), accept(), and endModule() are described in IModule. For each processor module the associated filter modules are executed before each proof obligation to be generated. If the filter returns false, the proof obligation is not generated. The execution of the processor module is not affected otherwise so that all side-effects can take place, in particular, updates of the state repository.
Since:
3.0
See Also:
  • POGFilterModule
  • POGProcessorModule

    • initModule

      void initModule(IPOGStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Initialisation code for the module
      Parameters:
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem initialising this module

    • accept

      boolean accept(String poName, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Runs the proof obligation generator module. This is executed once for each proof obligation.
      Parameters:
      poName - the name of the proof obligation to be generated
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Returns:
      whether the proof obligation with the given name should be generated
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem running this module

    • endModule

      void endModule(IPOGStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Termination code for the module
      Parameters:
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem terminating this module
